subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! Your letter hath been received. Concerning the company whereof you had written [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نامه شما رسید در خصوص کمپانی مرقوم نموده بودید من مستر
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @personal instructions, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
